name: Jack Teagarden
description: '''Weldon Leo''' "'''Jack'''" '''Teagarden''' (August 20, 1905 – January 15, 1964) was an American [[jazz]] [[Trombone|trombonist]] and singer. He led both of his bands himself and was a [[sideman]] for [[Paul Whiteman]]'s orchestra. From 1946 to 1951, he played in [[Louis Armstrong]]'s All-Stars.
